privileged_info_summary: All task metadata claims are verified and consistent. The task requires creating a custom 'Durability' rating criterion in Magento and manually adding three approved product reviews: (1) Business Laptop Pro (SKU LAPTOP-001) by TechBuyer42 with Quality=5, Value=4, Price=3, Durability=5; (2) Wireless Headphones (SKU HEADPHONES-001) by AudioFan with Quality=4, Value=5, Price=4, Durability=3; (3) Yoga Mat Premium (SKU YOGA-001) by FitnessPro with Quality=5, Value=4, Price=5, Durability=4. All referenced products are pre-seeded in the Magento database.
